title: Create RevisionEventForm React TypeScript component with phases
job:
Create plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/RevisionEventForm.tsx

A React component for creating revision events after a review decision.

Show a form with:
- Summary textarea (what changed)
- Reason textarea (why it changed)
- Affected phases: checkboxes listing all phases in the project (passed as props)
- Note: when a revision event is created, affected phases should be flagged

Props: sourcePhaseId, projectPhases (Phase array), onSave callback that receives { sourcePhaseId, affectedPhaseIds, summary, reason }

Include a heading: 'Record Downstream Impact'
Show this form only after a review decision has been made.

Use inline styles. TypeScript. Import Phase from ../../worker/types. Commit.
